name: sha256_367826bb3
description: Fix PostgreSQL row lock contention in flash sale inventory deduction: replace BEGIN/SELECT FOR UPDATE/UPDATE/COMMIT with atomic UPDATE products SET stock=stock-1 WHERE id=$1 AND stock>0 RETURNING stock, add pg_advisory_xact_lock for hot-row protection, reduces p99 latency from 2000ms to under 50ms at 3000 QPS
